/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/admission/AdmissionControl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/business/EdgeDataMessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/business/EdgeDataPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/business/KafkaSink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/business/NodeIdentity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/business/PassThroughBusiness.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/business/RedisStateCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/common/Endpoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/discovery/DiscoveryService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/discovery/RouteManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/frame/EdgeDataFrame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/frame/TunnelFrame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/kcp/KcpTunnel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/network/TcpEgress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/network/TcpIngress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iota_proxy.dir/src/ProxyRuntime.cpp.o -o iota_proxy  myring-build/libmyring.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librdkafka.so -luring
